description: You are a travel consultant at Global Horizons. Create a visually engaging 7-day 'Italian Renaissance' tour proposal for Mr. & Mrs. Sterling in a landscape-oriented document. The proposal must include a cover section featuring the agency logo (/home/ga/Documents/images/logo.png), the tour title 'Italian Renaissance Tour', and the client name. Use a two-column layout for the daily itinerary details sourced from /home/ga/Documents/tour_data.json, ensuring day titles use heading styles and include activity and hotel details. Incorporate the destination images (rome_colosseum.jpg, florence_duomo.jpg, and venice_canal.jpg) at appropriate locations within the itinerary. Save the completed proposal to /home/ga/Documents/Italy_Proposal_2025.odt.
